en: ground turkey meat, you make that into a burger instead of red meat.
ko: 칠면조 고기를 붉은 고기 대신 버거로 만들 수 있어.

en: Why would anyone do that to themselves?
What if I told you that I could make a turkey burger that tastes better than any other burger you've ever had?
ko: 내가 만든 칠면조 버거가 네가 먹어본 어떤 버거보다 맛있다고 하면 어쩔래?

en: Challenge accepted. Cook off later today in the courtyard.
ko: 도전 받아들였어. 오늘 오후에 마당에서 요리 대결이야.

en: If I win, hamburgers remain in the commissary.
What do I get if I win?
The rarest jewel of all. Victory over me, Ron Swanson.
ko: 가장 희귀한 보석. 나, 론 스완슨에 대한 승리.

en: I don't know. I couldn't really hear him. It sounded like his name was Forb. You get his number? No.
ko: 잘 모르겠어. 잘 안 들렸어. 그의 이름이 포브 같았어. 그의 번호 알아? 아니.

en: Hey, I'm just going to pop over to Grain and Simple to get the very best ingredients for my burger. Do you want to come?
ko: 나는 최고의 재료를 사러 Grain and Simple에 잠깐 다녀올 거야. 같이 갈래?

en: What is Grain and Simple? It's a health food store.
ko: Grain and Simple이 뭐야? 건강식품 가게야.

en: Pawnee doesn't have a health food store.
No, but Snerling does, and it's only a 40-minute drive.
I'm getting healthier snacks for the shoeshine stand. Chris is a food genius.
ko: 구두닦이 가게를 위한 건강한 간식을 사는 중이야. 크리스는 음식 천재야.

en: Did you know that the food you eat becomes energy? Yeah.
ko: 네가 먹는 음식이 에너지가 된다는 거 알고 있었어? 응.
